name: Certestic
description: Certestic is an AI-powered IT certification training platform that uses machine learning and adaptive learning science to help IT professionals prepare for and pass AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, CompTIA, Cisco, VMware, and 100+ other IT certifications.

services.name: AI-Powered IT Certification Training
services.description: Comprehensive certification training using adaptive AI, personalized study plans, and intelligent knowledge gap analysis

areaOfFocus.name: Other IT Certifications
areaOfFocus.description: Database, DevOps, infrastructure certifications and more

platformFeatures.name: AI-Generated Practice Exams
platformFeatures.description: Machine learning generates realistic, targeted practice questions based on official certification specifications. Users can request exams on specific topics.

platformFeatures.name: Knowledge Gap Analysis
platformFeatures.description: Machine learning analyzes exam performance to identify exactly which topics and concepts users struggle with.

platformFeatures.name: Adaptive Learning Paths
platformFeatures.description: Based on performance analysis, the platform recommends personalized next steps and study sequences.

platformFeatures.name: Performance Analytics
platformFeatures.description: Detailed dashboards showing score trends, topic mastery, readiness assessment, and improvement areas.

platformFeatures.name: Full-Length Exam Simulation
platformFeatures.description: Realistic practice exams simulating actual certification format, timing, difficulty, and question types.

technicalCapabilities.processorRequirements: Any processor capable of running modern web browsers
machineLearningCapabilities: Natural Language Processing for content analysis

Review.reviewBody: Certestic's AI-powered approach to certification training is game-changing. The knowledge gap analysis helped me focus on exactly what I needed to study.

educationalAlignment.educationalFramework: Based on official certification blueprints and exam specifications
learningOutcomes: Accelerate career in IT and cloud computing

pricingOptions.name: Beta Access (Current)
pricingOptions.description: Complete access to all platform features during beta. Includes 300 free credit coins for exam generation.

targetAudience.name: IT Professionals
targetAudience.description: Current IT professionals seeking career advancement through certifications

targetAudience.name: Cloud Engineers
targetAudience.description: Professionals specializing in AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud seeking professional certifications

targetAudience.name: Career Changers
targetAudience.description: Professionals transitioning into IT careers and seeking foundational certifications

targetAudience.name: Students
targetAudience.description: Computer science and IT students preparing for industry certifications

keyBenefits: Personalized learning based on AI analysis of strengths and weaknesses
Efficient study focused on knowledge gaps rather than known material
Realistic exam simulation and timing practice
